question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero didactic questions. It immediately writes the solution and explains it. The only questions in the conversation come from the Student.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks were surfaced to the student. The crux (zip's silent truncation, why the guard must come first) was explained reactively rather than posed as a question.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there are no questions. The Tutor delivered the full solution upfront, leaving nothing for the learner to derive.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and explanations are clear and accurate, including a nice note about the empty-sum identity and zip truncation. But it's a one-way explanation, not a pedagogical dialogue.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
